headline: PG&E Outages Hit Nearly 57,500 Customers Amid California Fire Risk
summary: Dry winds and red flag warnings pushed PG&E to implement planned and unplanned outages across parts of California.

headline: 3 Beaten-Down Utility Stocks: Which Is the Best Dip-Buy Right Now?
summary: Regulated electric utilities typically anchor retirement portfolios with steady income. Right now, three large-cap names are trading with unusual volatility: Edison International (NYSE: EIX), Eversource Energy (NYSE: ES), and PG&E (NYSE: PCG) all sit well below 52-week highs, trail the S&P 500 over the past month, and carry visible overhangs that have pushed valuations to ... 3 Beaten-Down Utility Stocks: Which Is the Best Dip-Buy Right Now?

headline: Dan Loeb Dumps Microsoft, Slashes Nvidia And Rail Stocks In Sweeping Q1 Portfolio Overhaul
summary: Daniel Loeb's Third Point added Meta, Alphabet, Broadcom, and semiconductor names while sharply cutting Nvidia and Microsoft positions in Q1.

headline: PolyAI opens its Agentic Dialog Platform, making the tech behind complex conversations for hundreds of enterprises available to every builder
summary: PolyAI, the Agentic Dialog Platform for building the conversational enterprise, today opened its platform to every builder. Free for the first two months, the technology powering the world's most demanding customer conversations across 75 languages and 25 countries is now available to any team with an idea and an email address.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on PG&E, Lowers Price Target to $22
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Richard Sunderland   maintains PG&E (NYSE:PCG) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $23 to $22.
